lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਛਪੈ ਕਿਉ ਛਪਿਆ ਏਕੀ ਏਕੀ ਵੰਡਿ ਦੀਆ ॥੪॥੭॥
lines.translit: kahai naanak chhapai kiau chhapiaa ekee ekee vandd deea |4|7|
lines.english: Says Nanak, by hiding, how can the Lord be hidden? He has given each their share, one by one. ||4||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਰੇਖ ਅਨਾਹਦੁ ਵਾਜੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨਿ ਕੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tis roop na rekh anaahad vaajai sabad niranjan keea |1|
lines.english: The Name has no form or outline; it vibrates with the unstruck Sound Current; through the Word of the Shabad, the Immaculate Lord is revealed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਕਰਤੂਤਿ ਬੇਲਿ ਬਿਸਥਾਰੀ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਫਲੁ ਹੂਆ ॥
lines.translit: karam karatoot bel bisathaaree raam naam fal hooaa |
lines.english: The vine of good actions and character has spread out, and it bears the fruit of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੇ ਵਖਿਆਣੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਜੇ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: kare vakhiaan jaanai je koee |
lines.english: One can speak on this only when he knows it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਵੈ ਸੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: amrit peevai soee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He alone drinks in the Ambrosial Nectar. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਤਾ ਛੋਡੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਕੇ ਲਾਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jotee jot samaanee bheetar taa chhodde maaeaa ke laahe |2|
lines.english: When one's light blends into the Divine Light, then the desire for Maya is ended. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑ ਪੀਆ ਸੇ ਮਸਤ ਭਏ ਹੈ ਤੂਟੇ ਬੰਧਨ ਫਾਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: jina peea se masat bhe hai tootte bandhan faahe |
lines.english: Those who drink it in are enraptured; their bonds and shackles are cut away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਰੈ ਰੂਪਿ ਨਿਰਾਲਮੁ ਬੈਠਾ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਵਿਚਿ ਛਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: raarai roop niraalam baitthaa nadar kare vich chhaaeaa |3|
lines.english: Among the tumults and forms, He sits in serene detachment; He bestows His Glance of Grace upon those who are engrossed in the illusion. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਜੋਤਿ ਰੂਪੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਦੇਖਿਆ ਸਗਲ ਭਵਨ ਤੇਰੀ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sarab jot roop teraa dekhiaa sagal bhavan teree maaeaa |
lines.english: Among all lights, I behold Your Form; all the worlds are Your Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਅਨਾਹਦਿ ਸੋ ਸਹੁ ਰਾਤਾ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਕਹੈ ਵਿਚਾਰਾ ॥੪॥੮॥
lines.translit: sabad anaahad so sahu raataa naanak kahai vichaaraa |4|8|
lines.english: He, the Lord, is immersed in the Unstruck Shabad of the Word, says Nanak, the humble and meek. ||4||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੀਣਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਜਾਵੈ ਜੋਗੀ ਦਰਸਨਿ ਰੂਪਿ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: beenaa sabad vajaavai jogee darasan roop apaaraa |
lines.english: The Yogi who plays on the instrument of the Shabad gains the Blessed Vision of the Infinitely Beautiful Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਲੀ ਗਲਾ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: galee galaa sirajanahaar |
lines.english: The real words are the Words of the Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਗੁਣ ਗਲਾ ਕੇ ਸਿਰਿ ਭਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: mai gun galaa ke sir bhaar |
lines.english: My virtue is that I carry the load of my words upon my head.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮਿ ਜਨਮਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਲੀਜੀ ਲੀਜੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam kichh leejee leejai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: if throughout his life, he gathers in that which is truly worth gathering? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਨ ਆਵਹਿ ਯਾਦਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jab lag ridai na aaveh yaad |1|
lines.english: if the Lord is not cherished in the heart! ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਣਾ ਪੀਣਾ ਹਸਣਾ ਬਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: khaanaa peenaa hasanaa baad |
lines.english: How useless are eating, drinking and laughing,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਪਰਵਾਹ ਕੇਹੀ ਕਿਆ ਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: tau paravaah kehee kiaa keejai |
lines.english: Why should someone care for anything else,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਬੋਲੀਐ ਸਭੁ ਖਤੋ ਖਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh boleeai sabh khato khataa |
lines.english: Whatever one utters is totally false, the most false of the false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੀ ਮਤਿ ਮਤਾਗਲੁ ਮਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: man kee mat mataagal mataa |
lines.english: The intellect of the mind is like a drunken elephant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਮੁਹੁ ਲੈ ਕੀਚੈ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa muhu lai keechai aradaas |
lines.english: So what face should we put on to offer our prayer,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸਾ ਤੂੰ ਕਰਹਿ ਤੈਸਾ ਕੋ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaisaa toon kareh taisaa ko hoe |
lines.english: As You make us, so we become.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tujh bin doojaa naahee koe |
lines.english: Without You, there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪੁ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਦੁਇ ਸਾਖੀ ਪਾਸਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: paap pun due saakhee paas |2|
lines.english: when both virtue and vice are close at hand as witnesses? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਆਪੇ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਚਲਾਵੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tudh aape bhaavai tivai chalaavai |3|
lines.english: As it pleases Your Will, so do You lead us. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗ ਰਤਨ ਪਰੀਆ ਪਰਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: raag ratan pareea paravaar |
lines.english: The divine crystalline harmonies, their consorts, and their celestial families

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹੀ ਤੂੰ ਮਤਿ ਦੇਹਿ ਤੇਹੀ ਕੋ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jehee toon mat dehi tehee ko paavai |
lines.english: As is the understanding which You bestow, so do we receive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਉਪਜੈ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਸਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: tis vich upajai amrit saar |
lines.english: from them, the essence of Ambrosial Nectar is produced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕੋ ਬੂਝੈ ਏਹੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥੪॥੯॥
lines.translit: je ko boojhai ehu beechaar |4|9|
lines.english: If only this essential reality were understood! ||4||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਤੇ ਕਾ ਇਹੁ ਧਨੁ ਮਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak karate kaa ihu dhan maal |
lines.english: O Nanak, this is the wealth and property of the Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਅਪਨੈ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ਤਾ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਖੀਆ ਕਾਜੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa apanai ghar aaeaa taa mil sakheea kaaj rachaaeaa |
lines.english: When by His Grace He came to my home, then my companions met together to celebrate my marriage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵਹੁ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਕਾਮਣੀ ਬਿਬੇਕ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gaavahu gaavahu kaamanee bibek beechaar |
lines.english: So sing - yes, sing the songs of wisdom and reflection, O brides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਲੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਮਨਿ ਅਨਦੁ ਭਇਆ ਸਹੁ ਵੀਆਹਣ ਆਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: khel dekh man anad bheaa sahu veeaahan aaeaa |1|
lines.english: Beholding this play, my mind became blissful; my Husband Lord has come to marry me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮਰੈ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਭਤਾਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hamarai ghar aaeaa jagajeevan bhataar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My spouse, the Life of the world, has come into my home. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੂ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਹਮਰਾ ਵੀਆਹੁ ਜਿ ਹੋਆ ਜਾਂ ਸਹੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਤਾਂ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: guroo duaarai hamaraa veeaahu ji hoaa jaan sahu miliaa taan jaaniaa |
lines.english: When I was married within the Gurdwara, the Guru's Gate, I met my Husband Lord, and I came to know Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਹੁ ਲੋਕਾ ਮਹਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਰਵਿਆ ਹੈ ਆਪੁ ਗਇਆ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tihu lokaa meh sabad raviaa hai aap geaa man maaniaa |2|
lines.english: The Word of His Shabad is pervading the three worlds; when my ego was quieted, my mind became happy. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣਾ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਆਪਿ ਸਵਾਰੇ ਹੋਰਨਿ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aapanaa kaaraj aap savaare horan kaaraj na hoee |
lines.english: He Himself arranges His own affairs; His affairs cannot be arranged by anyone else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਕਾਰਜਿ ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਦਇਆ ਧਰਮੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਕੋਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jit kaaraj sat santokh deaa dharam hai guramukh boojhai koee |3|
lines.english: By the affair of this marriage, truth, contentment, mercy and faith are produced; but how rare is that Gurmukh who understands it! ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Aasaa, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਨਤਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਏਕੋ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhanat naanak sabhanaa kaa pir eko soe |
lines.english: Says Nanak, that Lord alone is the Husband of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸਾ ਸੋਹਾਗਣਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: jis no nadar kare saa sohaagan hoe |4|10|
lines.english: She, upon whom He casts His Glance of Grace, becomes the happy soul-bride. ||4||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚ ਪਉੜੀ ਸਾਚਉ ਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਂਉ ॥
lines.translit: sach paurree saachau mukh naanau |
lines.english: To chant the True Name with one's mouth is the true ladder.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹੁ ਬਨੁ ਸਮਸਰਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: grihu ban samasar sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: Home and forest are the same, for one who dwells in the balance of intuitive peace and poise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਗਤੁ ਭਈ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਠਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: duramat gat bhee keerat tthaae |
lines.english: His evil-mindedness departs, and the Praises of God take its place.
